barRaise.topFinding: The drift loop is healthy and self-correcting, but it is the only thing moving. Two releases landed since 06-19 (v0.58.41, v0.58.42) and the headline win is real: the ASSETS.md regen stranded uncommitted for two days finally shipped in v0.58.41 (2976d1d). But v0.58.42 then shipped a new terrain tile with no manifest entry and an untracked .import sidecar, re-staling ASSETS.md within the hour, and the 06-20 drift-fix regenerated it back into an uncommitted tree. The exact cycle the 06-19 audit predicted played out on schedule. The durable fix that breaks it, the two release.ps1 preship gates (br-release-footer-and-automsg-gate-2026-06-18), is on its sixth audit unbuilt. Meanwhile M1 has held at 40% since 2026-06-10 (ten days) and neither release this week was an M1 mechanics row. Land the gate, then point the next session at an actual M1 deliverable instead of maintenance.

actions.title: Land br-release-footer-and-automsg-gate-2026-06-18 (two release.ps1 preship guards); sixth audit running, the single durable closer for the manifest, footer, and bare-message classes.
Commit the 06-20 docs/ASSETS.md regen and add the untracked assets/art/terrain/BR256Grass_tile512.png.import sidecar on the next release.
Make the next focused session an M1 mechanics row (Hold the Wall mission script or save/load); M1 has held at 40% for ten days.
Backfill GDD footer entries v0.58.14 through v0.58.42. Queued as br-gdd-footer-v05814-v05842-2026-06-20.
Rewrite the bare CHANGELOG entries v0.58.25-v0.58.42 to describe their work. Queued as br-changelog-bare-automsg-v05825-v05842-2026-06-20.
Re-run write-dashboard-status (corrects workTreeClean and workQueueDepth) and wire the canonical-audit skill to populate the Rising.json audit block.
git rm --cached scripts/*.ps1.bak (ninth review) and correct the building.gd header version refs (v0.67.0 / v0.61.14 against a v0.58.42 repo).
Collapse the duplicate-range queue pairs to the wider -v05842 ids, close the shipped br-assets-manifest-regen-2026-06-18, and resolve wts-2026-06-19-br-stale-assets-md once the regen commits.
